message:
fix: prioritize admin user override check in getRequestUserId

Reorder the admin override check to occur before the standard
authenticated userId extraction. This ensures that when an admin
uses X-User-Id or X-User headers to impersonate a user for
debugging, the override takes effect.

Previous flow:
1. Check auth.userId (would return admin's own ID)
2. Check admin override headers (never reached if admin had userId)

New flow:
1. If admin: check override headers first, fallback to own userId,
   fallback to DEFAULT_DASHBOARD_USER_ID
2. If non-admin: use auth.userId or fallback to default

This fixes the bug where admins with a userId couldn't use the
"act as user" debugging feature because their own userId was
returned before the header check.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
